service.web.name: Web app
service.web.note: YOU'RE LOOKING AT IT: IF THIS PAGE LOADS, IT'S OPERATIONAL
service.api.name: API
service.api.note: LIVE CHECK AGAINST THE BACKEND HEALTH ENDPOINT
service.db.name: Database
service.db.note: COVERED BY THAT SAME BACKEND HEALTH CHECK
noHistory: WE DON'T PUBLISH UPTIME OR A 90-DAY HISTORY YET — WE START RECORDING IT FROM NOW. WHAT YOU SEE ABOVE IS A LIVE CHECK, RUN WHEN THIS PAGE OPENED.
degradedNote: THE CHECK IS AGGREGATE: IT REPORTS THAT SOMETHING IS FAILING, BUT NOT WHICH COMPONENT.
unknownNote: THIS CHECK ONLY RUNS FROM THE PUBLISHED SITE. FROM A LOCAL ENVIRONMENT OR A PREVIEW, THE BACKEND REJECTS THE ORIGIN AND WE CAN'T CLAIM ANYTHING — THIS IS NOT AN OUTAGE.
incidents.title: Incident history
incidents.subtitle: We report everything, including what went wrong. That's how we run the beta.
incidents.empty: No incidents published yet. We start keeping this history today: when something goes wrong, you'll see it here — with its date, how long it lasted and what we did.
incidents.report: SOMETHING BROKEN BUT GREEN HERE? LET US KNOW:
